Event: The Fearless Adventure
Event Date: 29/01/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: A300
New Facet

Sundering Storm
A whirlwind lashes out, and lasts 6 sec. For that duration, incoming damage against all enemy units is increased by 30%. The whirlwind also tears the armor of 2 random enemy units every 1,5 sec. When an enemy's armor is torn, the affected unit takes 400000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 30% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. Each of these enemy units also receives 450000 physical damage for 4 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
